title: begonia elmeri
intro: Begonia elmeri, also known as Begonia elmeriana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and stems of Begonia elmeri contain flavonoids, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas or infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in folk medicine in Southeast Asia.
